/usr/bin/c++ --coverage -O0 -g -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names --coverage "CMakeFiles/shibui-code.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/shibui-code.dir/src/app.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/shibui-code.dir/src/snapshot.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/shibui-code.dir/src/window_snap.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/shibui-code.dir/src/clipboard_mac.mm.o" "CMakeFiles/shibui-code.dir/src/window_snap_mac.mm.o" -o shibui-code.app/Contents/MacOS/shibui-code  -framework Cocoa -framework WebKit -ldl
